variables.notes: No explicit operating depreciation or amortisation row related to COGS/cost of operating revenue appears in the excerpt above financial lines. Therefore D&A is assumed embedded in the selected COGS bucket, so nothing should be added separately.

No explicit operating depreciation or amortisation row related to SG&A, admin, or R&D appears in the excerpt above financial lines. Research & Development Expense is already separately selected in both XSGA_COMPONENTS and XRD, and there is no separate amortization/depreciation line to add. Therefore nothing should be added separately.
